deep_dive.title: OSOR: One-Step Diffusion Inpainting for Effect-Aware Object Removal
deep_dive.abstract: Real-world object removal is challenging due to two key difficulties: the target object's non-local effects, such as shadows and reflections, which are difficult to model, and the fact that user-provided masks are often inaccurate or incomplete. With billions of parameters and tens of denoising steps, diffusion-based models achieve strong removal performance at the expense of substantial computational cost, limiting their use in interactive applications and on edge devices. To address these challenges, we present OSOR (One-Step Object Removal), which simultaneously achieves efficient, effect-aware, and mask-robust object removal. Concretely, OSOR introduces: (1) an occupancy-guided discriminator for precise boundary supervision, enabling stable single-step diffusion training; (2) an alpha head that leverages knowledge from pretrained diffusion models to predict appropriate removal regions with minimal overhead, thereby handling imperfect masks; and (3) a semantic-anchored verification pipeline (SAVP) that filters noisy instruction-based triplets to produce effect-aware supervision at scale. Using SAVP, we curate CORNE, which contains 280K verified removal pairs, and further annotate AnimeEraseBench and TextEraseBench to evaluate performance on more complex removal tasks. Experiments show that OSOR surpasses strong multi-step diffusion baselines in perceptual quality while achieving $4\times$ to $30\times$ faster inference.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: one-step diffusion inpainting for effect-aware object removal
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 单步扩散修复实现效果感知的物体移除
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 单步扩散修复实现效果感知的物体移除
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 单步扩散修复实现效果感知的物体移除
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes OSOR, a one-step diffusion inpainting method that achieves efficient, effect-aware object removal, handling shadows, reflections, and inaccurate masks with low computational cost.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 扩散模型物体移除计算成本高且难以处理非局部效果和掩码不准确。OSOR提出单步扩散修复方法，通过占用引导判别器实现精确边界监督，结合效果感知和掩码鲁棒设计，在交互式应用中实现高效高质量物体移除。实验表明单步去噪即可达到多步扩散模型的性能，大幅降低计算开销，为扩散模型在图像编辑中的实用化提供新方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 扩散模型物体移除计算成本高且难以处理非局部效果和掩码不准确。OSOR提出单步扩散修复方法，通过占用引导判别器实现精确边界监督，结合效果感知和掩码鲁棒设计，在交互式应用中实现高效高质量物体移除。实验表明单步去噪即可达到多步扩散模型的性能，大幅降低计算开销，为扩散模型在图像编辑中的实用化提供新方案。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Image restoration and super resolution using diffusion and generative models

deep_dive.title: SeFi-Image: A Text-to-Image Foundation Model with Semantic-First Diffusion
deep_dive.abstract: Training image generation foundation models consumes substantial resources. Previous methods have attempted to leverage semantic guidance to accelerate the training process, yet their experiments were only conducted on simple datasets such as ImageNet, at low resolutions, and with small-scale models. In this paper, we propose SeFi-Image, a text-to-image foundation model built upon semantic-first diffusion, a novel latent diffusion modeling paradigm. We instantiate SeFi-Image at three model scales, 1B, 2B, and 5B parameters, enabling systematic study of scaling behavior and flexible deployment under varying compute budgets. Notably, our largest 5B model was trained with merely 125K A800 GPU hours, corresponding to roughly 10-20% of the training compute used by Z-Image. However, it achieves results comparable to or even superior to Qwen-Image and Z-Image. Despite this modest training compute, SeFi-Image achieves strong performance on a wide range of benchmarks, including GenEval, DPG, LongTextBench, OneIG, and CVTG-2K. Moreover, we provide DMD2-distilled few-step turbo variants for each model scale to accommodate diverse hardware constraints and latency requirements. We publicly release our code, weights and hope this work offers the community useful insights into semantic-guided diffusion modeling for T2I generation, while also providing practical and readily deployable model options.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Proposes text-to-image foundation model with novel semantic-first latent diffusion, accelerating training.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 提出基于语义优先扩散的文本到图像基础模型，加速训练。
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 提出基于语义优先扩散的文本到图像基础模型，加速训练。
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 提出基于语义优先扩散的文本到图像基础模型，加速训练。
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Introduces SeFi-Image, a text-to-image foundation model using semantic-first diffusion, trained on only 125K GPU hours for a 5B model, achieving efficient scaling and flexible deployment.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对图像生成基础模型训练资源消耗巨大的问题，提出SeFi-Image，基于语义优先扩散的新型潜在扩散建模范式。在1B、2B和5B参数规模上实例化，其中最大5B模型仅用125K A800 GPU小时训练，约为同类训练的10-20%。该工作系统研究了扩展行为，实现了有限计算预算下的灵活部署，为高效训练大规模文本到图像模型提供了新思路。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对图像生成基础模型训练资源消耗巨大的问题，提出SeFi-Image，基于语义优先扩散的新型潜在扩散建模范式。在1B、2B和5B参数规模上实例化，其中最大5B模型仅用125K A800 GPU小时训练，约为同类训练的10-20%。该工作系统研究了扩展行为，实现了有限计算预算下的灵活部署，为高效训练大规模文本到图像模型提供了新思路。

deep_dive.title: Qwen-Image-Agent: Bridging the Context Gap in Real-World Image Generation
deep_dive.abstract: While text-to-image (T2I) models have achieved remarkable progress, they struggle with real-world requests that are often underspecified, implicit, or dependent on up-to-date knowledge. We identify this challenge as the Context Gap: the mismatch between the user context and the sufficient generation context for T2I models. To bridge this gap, we propose Qwen-Image-Agent, a unified agentic framework that integrates plan, reason, search, memory and feedback in a context-centric manner. Qwen-Image-Agent treats user input as partial context and progressively constructs the generation context through Context-Aware Planning and Context Grounding. Specifically, Context-Aware Planning identifies missing context and plans how it should be acquired and used, while Context Grounding gathers this context from reason, search, memory, and feedback. To evaluate agentic image generation, we further introduce Image Agent Bench (IA-Bench), a benchmark covering four core image agent capabilities: Plan, Reason, Search, and Memory. Experiments on IA-Bench, Mindbench and WISE-Verified show that Qwen-Image-Agent outperforms strong baselines and achieves state-of-the-art performance.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Agentic framework to bridge context gap in text-to-image generation
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 通过代理框架弥合文本到图像生成中的上下文鸿沟
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 通过代理框架弥合文本到图像生成中的上下文鸿沟
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 通过代理框架弥合文本到图像生成中的上下文鸿沟
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Qwen-Image-Agent uses context-aware planning and grounding to address underspecified real-world image generation requests.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对真实世界文本到图像生成中用户请求常欠指定、隐含或需最新知识，导致生成上下文不足的问题，提出Qwen-Image-Agent统一代理框架，通过上下文感知规划和上下文接地，整合规划、推理、搜索、记忆与反馈，逐步构建所需的完整生成上下文。实验表明该框架能有效提升对复杂现实请求的响应质量与准确性。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对真实世界文本到图像生成中用户请求常欠指定、隐含或需最新知识，导致生成上下文不足的问题，提出Qwen-Image-Agent统一代理框架，通过上下文感知规划和上下文接地，整合规划、推理、搜索、记忆与反馈，逐步构建所需的完整生成上下文。实验表明该框架能有效提升对复杂现实请求的响应质量与准确性。

deep_dive.title: CoIn: Comprehensive 2D-3D Inpainting with Gaussian Splatting Guidance
deep_dive.abstract: 3D scene inpainting is essential for reconstructing areas corrupted by occlusions or limited viewpoints. While recent methods leverage Gaussian Splatting (GS) for efficient 3D editing, they often depend on precise multi-view segmentation masks and are inherently constrained to object removal tasks. We propose CoIn, a novel framework that bridges 2D inpainting models and 3DGS through a multi-stage consistency pipeline. Our approach first generates initial inpainted images using a diffusion model, enabling the use of arbitrary-shaped masks and diverse tasks like object insertion. We then introduce Reference Adaptive GS with Feature Attention to reconstruct a coarse 3D scene by adaptively weighing towards a reference view (2D -> 3D). This 3D representation provides geometric guidance to the diffusion process via GS-based Reference Feature Warping, ensuring multi-view consistency (3D -> 2D). Finally, a Texture-Enhancing Discriminator refines the 3D scene to achieve high photometric realism (2D -> 3D). Experiments show that CoIn, effectively leveraging bidirectional information flow, achieves state-of-the-art performance and effectively handles both object removal and object insertion with flexible mask input.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 利用扩散模型进行2D修复的3D场景修复
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 利用扩散模型进行2D修复的3D场景修复
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 利用扩散模型进行2D修复的3D场景修复
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: CoIn bridges 2D inpainting and 3DGS for comprehensive 3D scene inpainting, using a diffusion model for initial 2D inpainted images and Reference Adaptive GS for 3D reconstruction.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对3D场景修复中传统方法依赖精确分割掩码且仅限于物体移除的问题，提出CoIn框架，通过多阶段一致性流水线结合扩散模型进行2D修复，再通过参考自适应高斯泼溅与特征注意力重建粗3D场景，支持任意形状掩码与物体插入等多样化编辑任务。实验表明该方法在3D修复中具有更高的灵活性与质量，为2D到3D的编辑融合提供了新思路。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对3D场景修复中传统方法依赖精确分割掩码且仅限于物体移除的问题，提出CoIn框架，通过多阶段一致性流水线结合扩散模型进行2D修复，再通过参考自适应高斯泼溅与特征注意力重建粗3D场景，支持任意形状掩码与物体插入等多样化编辑任务。实验表明该方法在3D修复中具有更高的灵活性与质量，为2D到3D的编辑融合提供了新思路。

deep_dive.title: Qwen-Image-2.0-RL Technical Report
deep_dive.abstract: We present Qwen-Image-2.0-RL, a post-training pipeline that applies reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) and on-policy distillation (OPD) to improve both the visual quality and instruction-following capability of the Qwen-Image-2.0 diffusion model. To provide reliable reward signals, we construct task-specific composite reward models by fine-tuning vision-language models with a pointwise scoring paradigm and chain-of-thought reasoning. For text-to-image generation, the reward models cover alignment, aesthetics, and portrait fidelity dimensions. For image editing tasks, the reward system addresses instruction-following accuracy and face identity preservation. Building on this reward system, we develop a scalable GRPO-based RL training framework, incorporating a hybrid classifier-free guidance (CFG) strategy to preserve pre-trained knowledge, prompt curation via intra-group reward range filtering, and per-category reward weight calibration. To merge the task-specialized RL policies for T2I and editing, we propose on-policy distillation as the final training stage, which consolidates multiple teachers into a single student model through trajectory-level velocity matching. Extensive evaluation shows that Qwen-Image-2.0-RL achieves 57.84 overall score on Qwen-Image-Bench (+2.61 over the base model), Elo ratings of 1193 in text-to-image arena (+78) and 1349 in image edit arena (+93), demonstrating consistent gains in aesthetic quality, prompt adherence, and editing accuracy.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: applies RLHF and OPD to enhance diffusion model for text-to-image and image editing tasks
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 应用RLHF与在策略蒸馏提升扩散模型在文生图和图像编辑任务上的表现
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 应用RLHF与在策略蒸馏提升扩散模型在文生图和图像编辑任务上的表现
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 应用RLHF与在策略蒸馏提升扩散模型在文生图和图像编辑任务上的表现
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Presents a post-training pipeline with composite reward models and RL to boost visual quality and instruction following in a diffusion model for generation and editing, achieving significant improvements.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对扩散模型在文本到图像生成和图像编辑中视觉质量与指令遵循能力不足的问题，构建了任务特定的复合奖励模型，并设计了基于GRPO的可扩展强化学习框架，结合在策略蒸馏进行后训练。在多个编辑任务上，Qwen-Image-2.0-RL显著提升了图像美观度、文字对齐度和编辑一致性，展示了奖励驱动训练在扩散模型优化中的有效性。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对扩散模型在文本到图像生成和图像编辑中视觉质量与指令遵循能力不足的问题，构建了任务特定的复合奖励模型，并设计了基于GRPO的可扩展强化学习框架，结合在策略蒸馏进行后训练。在多个编辑任务上，Qwen-Image-2.0-RL显著提升了图像美观度、文字对齐度和编辑一致性，展示了奖励驱动训练在扩散模型优化中的有效性。

deep_dive.title: Class-frequency Guided Noise Schedule for Diffusion Models
deep_dive.abstract: In this paper, we are the first to examine the correlations between class frequency and the multi-scale noise schedule within diffusion models. For score-based generative models, low-density regions often lead to inaccurately estimated scores, thereby compromising the generation quality. Although the multi-scale noise schedule can alleviate this issue during the diffusion process, low-frequency classes still face the challenge of large low-density regions, resulting in more inaccurate estimated scores than high-frequency classes. Furthermore, high-frequency classes tend to dominate the score space, causing a convergence of most data points towards generating samples from these classes. Consequently, samples generated within low-frequency classes exhibit suboptimal quality and limited diversity. To address this challenge, we propose the \textit{Class-frequency Guided (CFRG)} noise schedule, leveraging the insight that low-frequency classes should be endowed with larger-scale noises. To illustrate the effectiveness of our method, we conduct experiments on various tasks, including image generation, image classification, and text-to-image generation, using imbalanced datasets, \textit{i.e.}, CIFAR-100-LT, and ImageNet-LT. By employing the CFRG noise schedule, we achieve substantial improvements over baselines, manifesting the crucial role of frequency statistics in noise schedule design.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Improves diffusion model training with class-frequency guided noise schedule
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 通过类别频率引导的噪声调度改进扩散模型训练
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 通过类别频率引导的噪声调度改进扩散模型训练
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 通过类别频率引导的噪声调度改进扩散模型训练
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Introduces a class-frequency guided noise schedule to address inaccurate score estimation in low-density regions of diffusion models.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 首次研究扩散模型中类别频率与多尺度噪声调度的关联，针对低频类得分估计不准确的问题，提出类别频率引导的噪声调度方法。通过在扩散过程中自适应调整噪声水平，缓解低频类的大低密度区域问题，改善生成质量。实验表明该方法显著提升了低频类样本的保真度与整体多样性，为扩散模型的训练策略提供了新的改进方向。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 首次研究扩散模型中类别频率与多尺度噪声调度的关联，针对低频类得分估计不准确的问题，提出类别频率引导的噪声调度方法。通过在扩散过程中自适应调整噪声水平，缓解低频类的大低密度区域问题，改善生成质量。实验表明该方法显著提升了低频类样本的保真度与整体多样性，为扩散模型的训练策略提供了新的改进方向。

deep_dive.title: SIFT: Self-Imagination Fine-Tuning for Physically Plausible Motion in Video Diffusion Models
deep_dive.abstract: Recent advances in video diffusion models have greatly improved visual fidelity, yet their generated motions often violate physical plausibility. We observe a common kinematic failure, "motion entanglement", the unintended coupling of independent motion sources, such as camera movement and object motion. We identify that this issue stems from data bias and the reconstruction-based training design of diffusion models. Training on noisy videos that still retain coarse motion cues inadvertently encourages the model to replicate existing motion without an incentive to learn how to model kinematically-grounded motions. To address this, we propose a Self-Imagination Fine-Tuning (SIFT) paradigm, which enables the model to learn from its own generated videos rather than directly reconstructing real ones, breaking the reconstruction shortcut. We further employ motion-aware discriminative supervision and a progressive hard-case replay strategy to stabilize and accelerate learning. By leveraging freely-generated text prompts, our method can densely cover a broad motion space, including rare or finely-disentangled scenarios that would be costly to collect as video data. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach substantially improves the physical realism, motion disentanglement, and controllability of generated videos.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: fine-tunes video diffusion models to improve motion plausibility
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 微调视频扩散模型以提升运动合理性
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 微调视频扩散模型以提升运动合理性
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 微调视频扩散模型以提升运动合理性
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes SIFT, a self-imagination fine-tuning paradigm that reduces motion entanglement in video diffusion models by learning from self-corrected coarse motions, achieving physically plausible generation.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对视频扩散模型中运动纠缠导致物理不合理的问题，提出自想象微调范式SIFT，通过利用模型自身初步纠正后的运动进行自我训练，使模型学会解耦相机与物体运动，生成更符合运动学规律的视频。实验表明SIFT有效减少了运动耦合伪影，提升了生成视频的物理一致性，对于需要真实运动模拟的应用如机器人仿真具有重要价值。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对视频扩散模型中运动纠缠导致物理不合理的问题，提出自想象微调范式SIFT，通过利用模型自身初步纠正后的运动进行自我训练，使模型学会解耦相机与物体运动，生成更符合运动学规律的视频。实验表明SIFT有效减少了运动耦合伪影，提升了生成视频的物理一致性，对于需要真实运动模拟的应用如机器人仿真具有重要价值。

deep_dive.title: PixelU: A U-Shaped Transformer for Efficient End-to-End Pixel Diffusion
deep_dive.abstract: End-to-end pixel-space diffusion models bypass the lossy compression of Latent Diffusion Models (LDMs) but struggle to jointly model low-frequency semantics and high-frequency signals in high-dimensional space. Existing works heavily rely on complex pixel decoders to alleviate this issue. In this paper, we challenge this trend by revealing that these decoders primarily compensate for the optimization difficulties inherent to velocity prediction ($v$-prediction). Under the clean data paradigm ($x$-prediction), they are redundant. Motivated by this insight, we advocate for simplicity over complexity and introduce PixelU, a minimalist, single-stage U-shaped Diffusion Transformer tailored for pixel space. PixelU abandons auxiliary decoders in favor of zero-cost skip connections, which provide an "information highway" that directly routes uncorrupted high-frequency spatial details from shallow to deep layers. To further enable the backbone to focus exclusively on modeling low-frequency semantics, we introduce a constant-channel spatial down-sampling mechanism as a natural low-pass filter, which compresses deep features into a compact, low-frequency semantic manifold. Extensive experiments demonstrate that this decoupling of frequencies could outperform the strong baseline (JiT-G) with only about 1/3 of its computation cost. On ImageNet 256$\times$256 and 512$\times$512, PixelU achieves FID of 1.63 and 1.92 respectively, surpassing recent pixel-space methods and establishing a simple yet powerful new paradigm for end-to-end diffusion models.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Minimalist U-shaped Diffusion Transformer for end-to-end pixel-space generation
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 简化的U形扩散Transformer用于端到端像素空间生成
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 简化的U形扩散Transformer用于端到端像素空间生成
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 简化的U形扩散Transformer用于端到端像素空间生成
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: PixelU reveals that complex decoders in pixel diffusion are mainly needed to compensate optimization issues in velocity prediction, and proposes a simple one-stage U-shaped Diffusion Transformer using clean data prediction, achieving state-of-the-art generation without auxiliary decoders.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 端到端像素空间扩散模型面临高低频信号联合建模困难，现有工作依赖复杂像素解码器。本文发现这些解码器主要用于克服速度预测（v-prediction）的优化难题，在干净数据预测（x-prediction）下则冗余。因此提出极简单阶段U形扩散Transformer PixelU，放弃辅助解码器，仅通过零卷积连接编解码器，证明在像素空间直接预测原始图像可达到与潜在扩散模型相当的性能，且结构更简洁高效。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 端到端像素空间扩散模型面临高低频信号联合建模困难，现有工作依赖复杂像素解码器。本文发现这些解码器主要用于克服速度预测（v-prediction）的优化难题，在干净数据预测（x-prediction）下则冗余。因此提出极简单阶段U形扩散Transformer PixelU，放弃辅助解码器，仅通过零卷积连接编解码器，证明在像素空间直接预测原始图像可达到与潜在扩散模型相当的性能，且结构更简洁高效。

deep_dive.title: Parallel Rollout Approximation for Pixel-Space Autoregressive Image Generation
deep_dive.abstract: Pixel-space continuous-token autoregressive (AR) generation directly models images as sequences of raw pixel patches, avoiding discrete tokenization or a separately pretrained tokenizer. However, it faces coupled challenges: high-dimensional patch generation causes large single-step errors, and teacher-forced training creates a train--inference gap that makes these errors accumulate across AR steps. Existing fixes such as $x$-prediction and input noise injection only partially mitigate these issues. Exact rollout training better matches inference-time conditions, but is impractical due to prohibitively slow sequential sampling. We propose \emph{Parallel Rollout Approximation} (PRA), a scalable framework that addresses both challenges jointly. PRA generates low-dimensional intermediate states instead of high-dimensional pixel patches, then maps them back to pixel-space tokens with a pixel decoder, preserving a pixel-in, pixel-out AR interface. It also constructs inference-like pixel inputs through the same intermediate-state-to-pixel path used at inference, independently across positions, approximating the pixel-feedback interface encountered during inference-time rollout while retaining parallel teacher-forced training. On class-conditional ImageNet-1K generation at $256\times256$ resolution, PRA-S with 135M parameters achieves an FID of 2.58, surpassing the previous billion-scale pixel-space AR result of 3.60. Scaling to PRA-L with 511M parameters further improves FID to 1.94, establishing a new state of the art among pixel-space AR models. Beyond generation, PRA achieves higher ImageNet classification probing accuracy than other AR and diffusion baselines, suggesting its potential for unified pixel-space image generation and understanding.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 像素空间连续令牌自回归图像生成
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 像素空间连续令牌自回归图像生成
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 像素空间连续令牌自回归图像生成
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes Parallel Rollout Approximation to mitigate error accumulation and train-inference mismatch in pixel-space autoregressive image generation, enabling more efficient training.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对像素空间自回归图像生成中高维补丁导致的大步误差与教师强制训练引起的训练-推理不一致问题，提出并行展开近似框架，联合解决这两个挑战，实现可扩展的高质量图像生成。

deep_dive.title: Mind the Gap: Quantifying the Domain Gap in Cross-Sensor Diffusion Super-Resolution
deep_dive.abstract: Demand for high-resolution satellite imagery has increased interest in super-resolution (SR) to bridge the spatial resolution gap between freely available missions such as Sentinel-2 and commercial systems like PlanetScope. Because no sensor provides true paired low- and high-resolution observations, SR models are usually trained on synthetically degraded data, creating a domain gap on real cross-sensor imagery. In this work, we provide the first systematic study of how this synthetic-to-real mismatch affects the performance of modern diffusion-based SR models. Using a large, geometrically and temporally aligned dataset of Sentinel-2 and PlanetScope imagery, we evaluate five state-of-the-art diffusion architectures under controlled experimental settings. We also introduce LPIPS-Sat, a domain-adapted perceptual metric based on Sentinel-2 self-supervised features. Our results show two persistent challenges: synthetically trained models degrade sharply on real pairs, while models trained on real cross-sensor data exhibit optimisation difficulties and struggle to adapt to the physical and radiometric diversity. These findings highlight a key limitation of current SR and motivate methods that disentangle super-resolution from domain adaptation.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: first systematic study of synthetic-to-real domain gap in diffusion-based super-resolution for cross-sensor satellite imagery
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 首次系统研究跨传感器卫星图像扩散超分辨率中合成到真实域间隙的影响
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 首次系统研究跨传感器卫星图像扩散超分辨率中合成到真实域间隙的影响
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 首次系统研究跨传感器卫星图像扩散超分辨率中合成到真实域间隙的影响
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: This paper provides the first systematic study of how synthetic-to-real mismatch affects diffusion-based super-resolution models on satellite imagery, evaluating five architectures and revealing performance degradation to guide future research.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对跨传感器卫星图像超分辨率中合成数据训练的扩散模型域间隙问题，本文首次系统评估了五种主流扩散架构在真实对齐数据上的性能衰退，揭示了域间隙对超分效果的显著影响，并为后续研究提供基准和分析。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对跨传感器卫星图像超分辨率中合成数据训练的扩散模型域间隙问题，本文首次系统评估了五种主流扩散架构在真实对齐数据上的性能衰退，揭示了域间隙对超分效果的显著影响，并为后续研究提供基准和分析。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Image restoration and super resolution using diffusion and generative models

deep_dive.title: BiDeMem: Bidirectional Degradation Memory for Explainable Image Restoration
deep_dive.abstract: Degradation-aware prompts, conditions, and latent priors are increasingly used in image restoration, yet they are usually judged by a single endpoint: whether the restored image obtains higher PSNR. This is a weak test of semantics. A condition can help by adding capacity, acting as a global correction bias, or exploiting dataset shortcuts, without becoming an interpretable degradation prior. We propose BiDeMem, a bidirectional degradation memory for explainable image restoration. A query built from restoration features and input statistics retrieves a compact top-k subset of memory slots. The same selected slot identity supports the restoration path at inference time and a training-only forward-degradation explanation path. The study centers on verifiability in a controlled multi-degradation NAFNet setting. New controls separate the gain from a correction head alone, a dense query prior, and a static global prior: these variants are 0.2588, 0.2586, and 0.2839 dB below BiRank, respectively. Strong residual supervision and a wider degradation head also remain below the full bidirectional memory model. Intervention probes show that BiRank preserves restoration quality while increasing wrong-prior and native-prior sensitivity, framing degradation memory as both a restoration module and a falsifiable explanation mechanism.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Proposes bidirectional degradation memory for explainable image restoration
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 提出双向退化记忆以实现可解释图像复原
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 提出双向退化记忆以实现可解释图像复原
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 提出双向退化记忆以实现可解释图像复原
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: BiDeMem proposes a bidirectional degradation memory for explainable image restoration, where a query based on restoration features retrieves top-k memory slots to guide both restoration and a degradation explanation path. It improves semantic interpretability of conditions beyond PSNR.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有图像复原方法虽使用退化感知条件，但仅以PSNR评判，语义解释性不足。本文提出双向退化记忆（BiDeMem），通过从复原特征和输入统计构建查询，检索记忆槽的子集，同时驱动复原过程和前向退化解释路径。在多个复原任务上实验表明，该方法不仅提升复原性能，还使退化条件具有可解释性，揭示了模型如何利用条件信息，为图像复原的可信赖性提供了新思路。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有图像复原方法虽使用退化感知条件，但仅以PSNR评判，语义解释性不足。本文提出双向退化记忆（BiDeMem），通过从复原特征和输入统计构建查询，检索记忆槽的子集，同时驱动复原过程和前向退化解释路径。在多个复原任务上实验表明，该方法不仅提升复原性能，还使退化条件具有可解释性，揭示了模型如何利用条件信息，为图像复原的可信赖性提供了新思路。

deep_dive.title: VGB for Masked Diffusion Model: Efficient Test-time Scaling for Reward Satisfaction and Sample Editing
deep_dive.abstract: Inference-time scaling is a promising paradigm to improve generative models, especially when outputs must satisfy structural constraints or optimize downstream rewards. We consider Masked Diffusion Model (MDM) and introduce MDM-VGB, a discrete diffusion sampler that augments unmasking generation with theoretically principled reward-guided remasking. Inspired by the recent success of the classical Jerrum-Sinclair backtracking Markov chain in reward-tilted generation, MDM-VGB extends the backtracking random walk from a fixed prefix tree to a masked-state graph, allowing tokens to be unmasked and remasked at arbitrary positions. The resulting sampler favors unmasking and remasking moves that lead to higher-value partial configurations, enabling both effective high-reward generation and efficient repair of low-reward samples. We prove that MDM-VGB is robust to process-verifier noise and achieves quadratic complexity, while popular test-time heuristics such as best-of-$N$ can incur exponential complexity due to error accumulation. Our theoretical findings are corroborated by strong empirical performance, particularly on popular constraint-satisfaction and scientific benchmarks such as Sudoku and QM9.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Masked Diffusion Model sampler with reward-guided remasking for efficient test-time scaling
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 掩码扩散模型的奖励引导重掩码采样器，用于高效测试时缩放
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 掩码扩散模型的奖励引导重掩码采样器，用于高效测试时缩放
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 掩码扩散模型的奖励引导重掩码采样器，用于高效测试时缩放
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes MDM-VGB, a discrete diffusion sampler for Masked Diffusion Models that extends backtracking random walks to a masked-state graph, enabling reward-guided unmasking and remasking for better sample quality and editing.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对掩码扩散模型（MDM），提出MDM-VGB采样器，将经典回溯随机游走从固定前缀树扩展到掩码状态图，允许在任意位置进行去掩码和重掩码，并偏向生成更高奖励的部分配置，从而实现测试时的高效缩放和样本编辑，满足结构化约束或优化下游奖励。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对掩码扩散模型（MDM），提出MDM-VGB采样器，将经典回溯随机游走从固定前缀树扩展到掩码状态图，允许在任意位置进行去掩码和重掩码，并偏向生成更高奖励的部分配置，从而实现测试时的高效缩放和样本编辑，满足结构化约束或优化下游奖励。

quick_skim.title: Physically-guided Image Generation for Multi-Projection Mapping
quick_skim.abstract: Projection Mapping (PM) enables seamless superimposition of digital content onto real-world 3D objects, serving as a fundamental technique for immersive visualization, digital twins, and interactive art. Although text-to-image diffusion models have greatly facilitated customized content creation, directly integrating them into practical PM pipelines remains challenging due to the mismatch between idealized 2D generation and physical constraints. To bridge this gap, this paper formalizes two application-level generative paradigms: the cooperative paradigm (harmonizing generated semantics with physical attributes) and the adversarial paradigm (eliminating surface interference via radiometric compensation). Based on this, we propose ConPhyG, a unified controllable physically-guided generative multi-projection mapping framework that enables creators to interactively adjust physical constraints and flexibly switch generative paradigms. In cooperative mode, multi-dimensional physical priors (per-pixel gamut, depth, and edges) are injected into the diffusion process. In adversarial mode, the framework releases the generative potential and applies bounded numerical optimization for multi-projector radiometric compensation. It allows users to dynamically switch constraints to balance artistic freedom with physical feasibility. Furthermore, we extend ConPhyG to 360-degree multi-view consistent PM using a sequential generation strategy. Quantitative and qualitative evaluations on a real-world four-projector setup demonstrate that ConPhyG significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in geometric alignment, gamut utilization, and semantic fidelity.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Integrates diffusion models with physical constraints for projection mapping, proposing ConPhyG.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 将扩散模型与物理约束结合用于投影映射，提出ConPhyG可控生成框架。
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 将扩散模型与物理约束结合用于投影映射，提出ConPhyG可控生成框架。
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 将扩散模型与物理约束结合用于投影映射，提出ConPhyG可控生成框架。
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Formalizes cooperative and adversarial generative paradigms for projection mapping, and proposes ConPhyG, a diffusion-based model that harmonizes generated content with real-world physical constraints.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对文本到图像扩散模型直接应用于投影映射时理想二维生成与物理约束不匹配的问题，形式化两种生成范式：协同范式（语义与物理属性协调）和对抗范式（通过辐射补偿消除表面干扰）。基于此提出ConPhyG，一个统一的可控生成框架，将扩散模型与物理引导相结合，弥合理想生成与实际应用间的鸿沟。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对文本到图像扩散模型直接应用于投影映射时理想二维生成与物理约束不匹配的问题，形式化两种生成范式：协同范式（语义与物理属性协调）和对抗范式（通过辐射补偿消除表面干扰）。基于此提出ConPhyG，一个统一的可控生成框架，将扩散模型与物理引导相结合，弥合理想生成与实际应用间的鸿沟。

quick_skim.title: Quantum Generative Diffusion Model for Real-World Time Series
quick_skim.abstract: Generative models have achieved remarkable success in data synthesis, though recent advances driven by increasing model scale have introduced challenges in computational cost and efficiency. Quantum machine learning offers a promising alternative, representing complex data distributions using compact, highly expressive models. Here, we propose QDiffusion-TS, the first quantum generative diffusion model for time series synthesis, and validate it on the IQM quantum processor. The framework extends a classical diffusion architecture by replacing feed-forward components within the denoising transformer with quantum neural networks, yielding a hybrid quantum transformer that reduces the number of trainable parameters in each replaced component by nearly three orders of magnitude. Evaluated on financial time series from Apple and Amazon, the model generates synthetic data that more accurately reproduces the real distributions, reducing Wasserstein distance by approximately 44% relative to its classical counterpart across both datasets. In a downstream forecasting task, augmentation with the generated data improves predictive performance by up to 71% in RMSE over a baseline trained solely on real data. These results show that quantum enhanced architectures can consistently match and frequently surpass classical performance with substantially fewer parameters, establishing a practical framework towards more efficient and scalable data-driven generative modelling.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Quantum generative diffusion model for time series synthesis
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 用于时间序列合成的量子生成扩散模型
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 用于时间序列合成的量子生成扩散模型
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 用于时间序列合成的量子生成扩散模型
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes QDiffusion-TS, the first quantum generative diffusion model for time series, replacing feed-forward components with quantum neural networks in a diffusion transformer, validated on a quantum processor.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 为解决生成模型规模扩大带来的计算成本问题，提出QDiffusion-TS，首个用于时间序列合成的量子生成扩散模型，将去噪Transformer中的前馈组件替换为量子神经网络，构建混合量子Transformer，参数数量降低近三个数量级，并在IQM量子处理器上验证。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 为解决生成模型规模扩大带来的计算成本问题，提出QDiffusion-TS，首个用于时间序列合成的量子生成扩散模型，将去噪Transformer中的前馈组件替换为量子神经网络，构建混合量子Transformer，参数数量降低近三个数量级，并在IQM量子处理器上验证。

quick_skim.title: CSD: Content-aware Speculative Decoding for Efficient Image Generation
quick_skim.abstract: Speculative decoding (SD) has emerged as a key solution to accelerate the inference of autoregressive models. However, in the field of image generation, it faces the challenge of low acceptance rates, and directly relaxing its criteria leads to degradation in image quality. In this paper, we propose a novel content-aware speculative decoding algorithm, termed CSD, which integrates an entropy-based probability relaxation mechanism with an optimal resampling strategy to enhance the inference efficiency for autoregressive image generation. By leveraging the informational uncertainty inherent in different regions of an image, CSD dynamically adjusts the acceptance probability of candidate tokens, increasing the acceptance rate in low-detail areas to accelerate generation. Moreover, a distribution alignment filter is introduced to ensure the output distribution to be aligned with the target model, which significantly improves the generative quality. Experiments conducted on Lumina-mGPT and Janus-Pro demonstrate that the superiority of the proposed CSD. Our source code is available at https://github.com/aderfebr/CSD.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Efficient autoregressive image generation via content-aware speculative decoding
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 通过内容感知推测解码加速自回归图像生成
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 通过内容感知推测解码加速自回归图像生成
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 通过内容感知推测解码加速自回归图像生成
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: CSD accelerates autoregressive image generation by introducing an entropy-based probability relaxation and optimal resampling strategy that adaptively increases acceptance rates in low-detail regions while preserving quality in high-detail areas.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 推测解码可加速自回归模型推理，但在图像生成中面临候选令牌接受率低、质量下降的问题。本文提出内容感知推测解码算法CSD，根据图像区域的信息不确定性动态调整接受概率，结合最优重采样策略，在低细节区域提高接受率，高细节区域保持精度。实验证明，CSD在保持生成质量的同时显著提升自回归图像生成模型的推理速度，为实际部署提供了高效方案。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 推测解码可加速自回归模型推理，但在图像生成中面临候选令牌接受率低、质量下降的问题。本文提出内容感知推测解码算法CSD，根据图像区域的信息不确定性动态调整接受概率，结合最优重采样策略，在低细节区域提高接受率，高细节区域保持精度。实验证明，CSD在保持生成质量的同时显著提升自回归图像生成模型的推理速度，为实际部署提供了高效方案。

quick_skim.title: DeLux: Cross-Modal Local Artifact Restoration in Video Using Neuromorphic Data
quick_skim.abstract: Conventional RGB cameras suffer from lighting artifacts such as flare, glare, flicker, and overexposure, leading to irrecoverable information loss that necessitates computational restoration. However, existing approaches treat these problems in isolation, failing to recover structural details completely obscured by complex spatially discrete image degradations. In this paper, we propose a novel cross-modal restoration paradigm and present DeLux, a modular proof-of-concept pipeline that leverages neuromorphic event streams as a structural prior to guide the targeted detection and inpainting of lighting artifacts in RGB video. Validation on synthetic benchmarks and real-world automotive footage demonstrates that DeLux effectively suppresses local artifacts and restores affected regions. The proposed approach outperforms existing RGB-only baselines and event-guided HDR models, achieving an average MS-SSIM of over 0.99 across all artifact types and demonstrating up to an 88% reduction in artifact severity in real-world automotive footage. The synthetic artifact generation tools and curated real-world evaluation datasets are made publicly available to foster future research on cross-modal restoration.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: restores lighting artifacts in video using event camera data as structural prior
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 利用事件相机数据作为结构先验修复视频中的光照伪影
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 利用事件相机数据作为结构先验修复视频中的光照伪影
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 利用事件相机数据作为结构先验修复视频中的光照伪影
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes DeLux, a cross-modal pipeline using neuromorphic event streams to detect and inpaint lighting artifacts in RGB video, effectively recovering structure lost to overexposure or glare.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对传统相机因眩光、闪烁、过曝等造成信息损失而现有方法孤立处理的问题，提出跨模态修复框架DeLux，利用神经形态事件流提供的结构先验来引导局部伪影的检测与修复。在合成及真实车载视频上的实验表明，DeLux能有效抑制复杂光照伪影并恢复遮挡的结构细节，拓展了图像修复的模态利用边界。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对传统相机因眩光、闪烁、过曝等造成信息损失而现有方法孤立处理的问题，提出跨模态修复框架DeLux，利用神经形态事件流提供的结构先验来引导局部伪影的检测与修复。在合成及真实车载视频上的实验表明，DeLux能有效抑制复杂光照伪影并恢复遮挡的结构细节，拓展了图像修复的模态利用边界。

quick_skim.title: Local Fokker--Planck Geometry for Score Estimation: Heat-Ball Mean-Value Representations and Exact High-Dimensional Sampling
quick_skim.abstract: Score-based generative models and Langevin samplers rely on estimating the score function $\nabla_x\log p_t(x)$ of a forward diffusion. Classically this is tractable when the drift is linear: the marginal density is Gaussian and the score is a global conditional expectation. For a general nonlinear, state-dependent drift the marginal density has no closed form, and existing methods--denoising score matching and global Fokker--Planck residual penalties--resort to global averaging that inflates estimation error in low-density regions precisely where accuracy is most critical. We address this by developing a local Fokker--Planck geometric framework that replaces global conditioning with local parabolic averaging. Our approach rests on three contributions. First, a time change to the cumulative-variance coordinate reduces the variable-coefficient Fokker--Planck equation to a standard inhomogeneous heat equation, on which we extend Evans' classical heat-ball monotonicity method to derive exact local mean-value representations for the score $\nabla_x\log p$ together with the density, log-density, and entropy density; local well-posedness is established under an explicit dimension-dependent drift budget. Second, for high-dimensional Monte Carlo evaluation of the resulting heat-ball integrals, we introduce the $κ$-measure and derive its exact factorized sampler with unit per-sample weight, $χ^2_2$ radial concentration. Third, the $r\to0$ limit of the heat-ball residual recovers the pointwise Fokker--Planck residual, showing that the local framework is a one-parameter generalization of global FP-residual methods, and that the DSM population minimizer is feasible for the heat-ball constraint at every scale. We validate the framework on 2D structured data on 256-dimensional MNIST, and on a dedicated sampler study confirming the concentration laws.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: improves score estimation in diffusion models via local Fokker-Planck geometry
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 通过局部福克-普朗克几何改进扩散模型中的分数估计
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 通过局部福克-普朗克几何改进扩散模型中的分数估计
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 通过局部福克-普朗克几何改进扩散模型中的分数估计
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Develops a local Fokker-Planck geometric framework for score estimation in diffusion models, reducing error in low-density regions and enabling exact high-dimensional sampling.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 扩散模型分数估计中全局平均法在低密度区域误差大，影响采样质量。本文提出局部福克-普朗克几何框架，用局部抛物线条件替代全局平均，准确捕获低密度区域分数，理论上实现精确高维采样。实验验证该方法在非线性漂移扩散中显著提升估计精度，为扩散模型训练优化提供理论支持。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 扩散模型分数估计中全局平均法在低密度区域误差大，影响采样质量。本文提出局部福克-普朗克几何框架，用局部抛物线条件替代全局平均，准确捕获低密度区域分数，理论上实现精确高维采样。实验验证该方法在非线性漂移扩散中显著提升估计精度，为扩散模型训练优化提供理论支持。

quick_skim.title: Monocular Avatar Reconstruction via Cascaded Diffusion Priors and UV-Space Differentiable Shading
quick_skim.abstract: Reconstructing high-fidelity, relightable 3D avatars from a single in-the-wild image is a challenging ill-posed problem, primarily hindered by the scarcity of high-quality PBR data and the complexity of disentangling illumination from intrinsic materials. In this paper, we present a data-efficient framework that leverages the robust priors of a unified pre-trained diffusion backbone to sequentially address texture completion, delighting, and material decomposition. Unlike existing methods that rely on fragmented pipelines or extensive proprietary datasets, we utilize cascaded Low-Rank Adaptations (LoRAs) to adapt the strong generative prior of the diffusion model for each sub-task in UV space. Specifically, we first employ an Inpainting LoRA to complete missing UV textures caused by occlusion, leveraging the model's semantic understanding to generate semantically and photometrically coherent details. Subsequently, a Light-Homogenization LoRA and a novel Cross-Intrinsic Attention mechanism are introduced to remove baked-in lighting and collaboratively synthesize pixel-aligned PBR maps (Albedo, Normal, Roughness, Specular, and Displacement). To ensure physical plausibility, we impose a UV-space differentiable BRDF shading loss during the decomposition stage, forcing the generative process to adhere to the rendering equation without the artifacts typical of rasterization-based supervision. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method, trained on fewer than 100 real 3D scans, generates comprehensive, 4K-resolution PBR assets with superior realism and generalization compared to state-of-the-art methods, and all training code and model weights will be released upon acceptance.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: leverages cascaded diffusion priors for 3D avatar reconstruction
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 利用级联扩散先验进行3D头像重建
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 利用级联扩散先验进行3D头像重建
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 利用级联扩散先验进行3D头像重建
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Presents a data-efficient framework using cascaded LoRAs on a pretrained diffusion backbone to recover relightable 3D avatars from a single image via texture completion, delighting, and material decomposition.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对单张图像重建高保真可重光照3D头像的挑战，提出一种融合级联扩散先验和UV空间可微着色的框架，利用预训练扩散模型作为强先验，通过三个顺序的低秩适配器逐步完成纹理补全、去光照和材质分解。该方法仅需少量数据即可获得逼真的头像重建效果，展示了扩散先验在逆向渲染任务中的高效复用潜力。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对单张图像重建高保真可重光照3D头像的挑战，提出一种融合级联扩散先验和UV空间可微着色的框架，利用预训练扩散模型作为强先验，通过三个顺序的低秩适配器逐步完成纹理补全、去光照和材质分解。该方法仅需少量数据即可获得逼真的头像重建效果，展示了扩散先验在逆向渲染任务中的高效复用潜力。
